proposal_summary: This proposal is an updated version of AIP-1.1, which proposes a lockup, budget, and transparency reporting for the 7.5% of ARB tokens distributed to the Foundation's Administrative Budget Wallet. It corrects a misconfigured 'start' date in the vesting contract from a previous proposal.

disclosed_entities.name: Foundation Administrative Budget Wallet / vesting vault
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: arbitrumFoundationWallet parameter references smart contract at 0x15533b77981cda0f85c4f9a485237df4285d6844, which is the vesting vault.

disclosed_entities.name: ARB
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: after the vote the Foundation will move 700M ARB tokens that are subject of AIP 1.1 to this contract

disclosed_entities.name: Arbitrum Foundation
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: The Arbitrum Foundation was created to fill this need

disclosed_entities.name: Security Council
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: it could be canceled by the Security Council

disclosed_addresses.textual_evidence: AIP smart contract referenced by this vote: [https://arbiscan.io/address/0x9E43f733Da0445b35f038FB34a6Fb8C2947B984C#code]
arbitrumFoundationWallet parameter references smart contract at 0x15533b77981cda0f85c4f9a485237df4285d6844, which is the vesting vault.

claimed_actions.raw_action: changing of the “passed” parameter on this AIP smart contract from false to true
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: documenting DAOs approval for the Foundation to use this referenced vesting vault
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: The on-chain action that the proposal is executing is changing of the “passed” parameter on this AIP smart contract from false to true, documenting DAOs approval for the Foundation to use this referenced vesting vault

claimed_complexity.reason: The proposal executes a single parameter update on a specific smart contract to document DAO approval.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: The on-chain action that the proposal is executing is changing of the “passed” parameter on this AIP smart contract from false to true

limitations: The proposal mentions moving 700M ARB tokens after the vote, but this appears to be a subsequent action rather than part of the direct on-chain execution of this proposal.
